task: Frontend Parcel SceneView Focus and Highlight
focus_behavior_implemented: Backend parcel detail map_focus is normalized into the frontend ParcelMapFocus contract.
Hydrated parcel detail dispatches a typed parcel map focus request when centroid or extent data is available.
SceneViewContainer listens for focus requests only after ArcGIS view.when() completes.
SceneViewContainer calls SceneView.goTo() using parcel extent when available, otherwise parcel centroid.
A dedicated hidden cfs-parcel-focus-layer displays a temporary simple-marker focus indicator at the centroid.
Existing mock GraphicsLayers, parcel hit-test selection, layer toggles, and operational layer registry behavior are preserved.
fallback_behavior: If map_focus is missing or invalid, the drawer remains in pending-geometry/static fallback mode.
If SceneView is unavailable or goTo fails, a focus result event marks the focus state as failed without breaking the dashboard.
Geometry-only focus objects are not acted on yet because full parcel geometry highlight remains future work.
Static parcel search/detail fallback remains intact when NEXT_PUBLIC_USE_BACKEND_API is disabled or backend hydration fails.

validation_results.browser_console_smoke: not available in this session; browser connector search returned no callable tools

remaining_map_intelligence_gaps: Full parcel polygon geometry is still not requested or rendered.
The current marker is centroid-based and temporary, not a governed polygon highlight.
Permit hotspot map rendering is not implemented.
Temporal map filtering and playback are not implemented.
Parcel geometry focus should be added through a lightweight governed geometry response or dedicated focus endpoint before polygon highlighting.
next_recommended_step: Phase 6 Full Parcel Geometry Highlight Readiness
